name: calendarbot-functions
description: Cloud Functions for CalendarBot - Telegram bot with Gemini AI and Google Calendar

scripts.deploy:env: gcloud functions deploy calendarbot --gen2 --runtime=nodejs20 --region=us-central1 --source=. --entry-point=calendarbot --trigger-http --allow-unauthenticated --project=proyecto-laboratorio-467421 --set-env-vars="$(grep -v '^#' .env | grep -v '^$' | tr '\n' ',')"
